name: Vapman Cleaning Brush (2x)
summary: The Vapman Cleaning Brush Set is the essential accessory for maintaining the performance and longevity of your Vapman vaporiser.
description: The Vapman Cleaning Brush Set is the essential accessory for maintaining the performance and longevity of your Vapman vaporiser. Featuring high-quality natural bristles, these brushes are specifically designed to remove residue and fine particles without scratching or damaging delicate surfaces. Natural bristles provide the perfect balance of softness and firmness, allowing for precise cleaning in hard-to-reach areas. From the heating pan to the airways and mouthpiece, the brushes easily sweep away buildup while preserving the integrity of sensitive materials. A clean device gives cleaner vapour and a more reliable dose.
